entries.title: History Analysis: Russian Revolution and George Washington
entries.content: The historical event of the Russian Revolution (1917 in Russia), which abolished the monarchy and led to the creation of the Soviet Union, is often compared to the legacy of George Washington in Revolutionary USA (leading continental army and serving as first president) in the realm of socio-cultural values in Canada.
